subject: refactor(review): pass diff directly to all review prompts
body:
Previously, review prompts would tell agents to run git commands to
fetch the diff. This change:

1. Fetches the diff once at the start of build_review_prompt
2. Passes it directly to all review prompt functions
3. Keeps agents isolated from git operations
4. Ensures reviewers only see changes since pipeline start

All review prompt variants now have *_with_diff versions:
- prompt_universal_review_with_diff
- prompt_security_focused_review_with_diff
- prompt_comprehensive_review_with_diff
- prompt_detailed_review_without_guidelines_with_diff
- prompt_reviewer_review_with_guidelines_and_diff

Removed dead code:
- Action::Review (no longer used after refactoring)
- prompt_reviewer_review_with_guidelines (legacy function)
- prompt_reviewer_review (replaced by _with_diff variants)

Error handling unified: all review types now return empty prompts
when diff retrieval fails or no changes are detected.
